closingMessage:
You are my past, my present, my future.
My everything.
I love you, Baby. Happy Anniversary.
💖

monthlyLetter.title: 💌 A Letter For You — April
paragraphs: Happy Anniversary! I can't believe how fast time flies when I'm with you. Every single day, I find new reasons to fall in love with you all over again.
This month, I've been thinking a lot about how lucky I am. The way you make me laugh, the way you understand me without words, the way you just... exist so beautifully in my world — it's everything.
Thank you for being patient with me, for your kindness, and for choosing to love me every single day. You're not just my girlfriend — you're my best friend, my safe space, and my favorite hello.
Here's to another month of us. I love you more than words can say.

milestones.title: The Day We First Met
milestones.description: I still remember that moment — the way you smiled, the way the world seemed to pause. I didn't know it then, but my life was about to change forever.

milestones.title: Butterflies & Nervous Hearts
milestones.description: My heart was racing the entire time. Every laugh we shared, every glance — I was falling, and I didn't want to stop.

milestones.title: When You Said Yes
milestones.description: The day you became mine, and I became yours. It felt like winning the lottery, except better.

milestones.title: Every Trip & Every Little Moment
milestones.description: From big adventures to quiet Sunday mornings — every moment with you is a treasure.

milestones.title: Our Anniversary
milestones.description: Another year, another chapter. My heart is fuller than ever because of you.

reasons: The way your eyes light up when you talk about something you love.
Your kindness to everyone around you — you have the most beautiful heart.
How you make ordinary days feel extraordinary.
Your strength — you face everything with grace.
The way you say my name — my favorite sound.
Your patience when I'm difficult — you never give up on us.
All the little things you do without being asked.
How safe I feel with you — you are my home.
Your smile — it turns my worst day into the best one.
Simply because you're you — and I'd choose you in every lifetime.
